title: Investigation after body of missing Cheltenham man found in ditch
description: Police are treating the death as unexplained due to a number of injuries.
content:
An investigation has been launched after the body of a man was found in a ditch with a number of unexplained injuries, police said.
The body, believed to be that of 62-year-old Andy Reed, was discovered in a ditch by the side of Old Gloucester Road i... [424 chars]

title: Man charged as three Jewish people assaulted
description: Two men, aged 58 and 26, and a 53-year-old woman were left with minor injuries from the attack.
content:
A man has been charged with physically assaulting and making antisemitic threats to three Jewish people in north London.

title: Barcelona vs Real Madrid LIVE: El Clasico result, latest updates and reaction as Barca clinch LaLiga title
description: Barcelona retain trophy with historic victory over arch-rivals at Camp Nou
content: Barcelona have been crowned as LaLiga champions for the second season in a row and 29th time overall. Hansi Flick’s side achieved the feat with three games still to play this term after dispatching of arch-rivals Real Madrid 2-0 in Sunday’s final El ... [1361 chars]

title: Michael Pennington, ‘Star Wars: Return Of The Jedi’ Actor, Dies At 82
description: Michael Pennington, a screen and stage actor whose roles included Death Star Commander Moff Jerjerrod in "Star Wars: Episode VI - Return of the Jedi," has died.
content:
Michael Pennington, a screen and stage actor whose roles included Death Star Commander Moff Jerjerrod in Star Wars: Episode VI: Return of the Jedi, has died.
Pennington died Sunday, according to The Telegraph in the U.K. He was 82. His cause of death... [2968 chars]

title: How hotels are stopping the 'dawn dash' for sunbeds after man wins payout
description: Some resorts enforce allocation rules from check-in to prevent people reserving loungers with towels in the "sunbed wars".
content:
Holidaymakers have told the BBC about ways some hotels and resorts are cracking down on people reserving sun loungers with towels, after a man won a payout over the practice.
